author: Marie-Laure Thuret
subject: v2.2.1
body: ## [2.2.1](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.2.0...v2.2.1) (2017-01-18) ### Bug Fixes * **createInstantsearch:** fix missing props (algolia/react-instantsearch#1867) ([a7d74db](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/a7d74db)), closes [#1867](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/1867)
